hero_subtitle: I master the complete software lifecycle. I combine Back-end robustness with Front-end dynamism, integrating Artificial Intelligence to accelerate development and design scalable architectures. I bring value by bridging consolidated technologies with the most modern frameworks on the market.
exp_zaitec_desc: Full development of the 'GestFincas' project, a Full-Stack portal for community management. Implementation of authentication, reservations, and forum modules using PHP, JavaScript, asynchronous requests (AJAX), and responsive design with Bootstrap.
exp_megasur_desc: Development and maintenance of cross-platform software. Creation of applications using Java, Android Studio, and Ionic Framework. Integration of relational databases (MySQL, SQLite, H2) and development of asynchronous architectures using WebSockets.
exp_atarfe_desc: Technical support to users, preventive and corrective hardware maintenance, and assistance in the configuration of local networks and microcomputer systems.
proj_profeweb_desc: Full-Stack design and development of a hybrid educational platform. Implementation of MySQL database with PDO, SQL injection security, and real-time asynchronous interactivity with Vanilla JS and Fetch API under the MVC pattern.
proj_gestfincas_desc: Full-Stack portal developed for comprehensive community management. Includes authentication, reservations, and forum modules, utilizing asynchronous requests (AJAX) and responsive design.
about_ai_desc: I combine consolidated technologies with the use of Artificial Intelligence (Prompt Engineering) in my workflow. This gives me great speed and autonomy for bug resolution, code refactoring, and software architecture design.
cert_ai_title: Intro to AI Development: From 0 to Production
